summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Win Zones feature fixes. All 10 features tested and passing. Key verifications: (1) Kansas appears as #2 in top Win Zones for Wheat market, (2) Zones 4-5 have opacity-40 class when expanded, (3) Zones 4-5 have EyeOff state (map outlines hidden by default), (4) All mode switching and controls work correctly.
passed_tests: Wheat market view shows Kansas in top 3 Win Zones (#2 Central Kansas) - PASS
Win Zone 4 and 5 cards show opacity-40 class when expanded via 'Show all zones' - PASS
Win Zone 4 and 5 do NOT have map outlines visible (EyeOff state, title='Show on map') - PASS
Win Zones toggle ON/OFF works correctly - PASS
Switching between Market/Coverage/Opportunity modes works - PASS
Zone visibility eye toggle works (click toggles between 'Show on map' and 'Hide on map') - PASS
Zone focus Adjust button shows Local/Regional/Territory toggles - PASS
Local/Regional/Territory focus toggles work correctly - PASS
Zoom to zone (crosshair button) works - map zooms to zone area - PASS
Show all zones / Show less toggle works - PASS
Market views (Rice, Wheat, Corn, Hogs, Pest Control) switch correctly - PASS
test_credentials: No authentication required. Mapbox token configured in frontend/.env
seed_data_creation: Data already loaded from previous sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Win Zones feature fully working with all fixes verified: (1) scoreKey for 'market' mode uses 'market_score' so Kansas appears in top zones, (2) MARKET_COVERAGE_CAP=0.85 allows 3+ zones, (3) useEffect auto-hides zone 4+ map outlines by default. Key data-testids: market-{rice|wheat|corn|hogs|pest}, win-zones-toggle, win-mode-{market|coverage|opportunity}, zone-focus-{local|regional|territory}, win-zone-card-{0-4}, zone-visibility-{0-4}, zoom-zone-{0-4}, show-all-zones.

kansas_in_top_zones.details: Central Kansas is #2 in Top Market Zones for Wheat (75 counties, 19% of market, 96% coverage)

zone_4_5_opacity.details: Zones 4 (North Texas) and 5 (SouthWest Idaho) have opacity-40 class when shown

zone_4_5_hidden_outlines.details: Zones 4-5 have title='Show on map' indicating map outlines are hidden by default

mode_switching.details: Market (bg-stone-800), Coverage (bg-green-700), Opportunity (bg-orange-600) all toggle correctly

zone_focus.details: Local/Regional/Territory focus options appear via Adjust button and toggle correctly

zone_visibility_toggle.details: Eye icon toggles between 'Show on map' (hidden) and 'Hide on map' (visible)

zoom_to_zone.details: Crosshair button zooms map to zone's bounding box

show_all_zones.details: Toggle between 'Show all 5 zones' and 'Show less' works correctly

market_views.details: All 5 market views (Rice, Wheat, Corn, Hogs, Pest Control) switch correctly
